issueCodes.title: Critical accessibility claim not verified
issueCodes.description: A critical accessibility claim is release-relevant but is not marked as verified.
issueCodes.resolution: Set coverage to verified and provide a verification method other than not-verified with evidence.

issueCodes.title: Reviewed compliance mapping not verified
issueCodes.description: A compliance mapping marked reviewed is missing verification evidence.
issueCodes.resolution: Use a verification method other than not-verified and provide evidence, or lower coverage until review is complete.

issueCodes.title: Production deployment controls missing
issueCodes.description: A production deployment target is missing required release approval, rollback, or health-check controls.
issueCodes.resolution: Require release approval, declare a rollback plan, and add a production healthCheckUrl.

issueCodes.title: Reference cycle
issueCodes.description: A directed reference path loops back to an earlier record.
issueCodes.resolution: Break the cycle by removing or changing one reference edge.

issueCodes.title: Orphan record
issueCodes.description: A non-product, non-schema record has no incoming or outgoing graph references.
issueCodes.resolution: Reference the record from a product or another record, or remove it.

issueCodes.title: Missing description
issueCodes.description: A record should include a useful human-readable description.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a non-empty description field.

issueCodes.title: Placeholder owner
issueCodes.description: The owner field uses a placeholder value.
issueCodes.resolution: Set owner to the team, person, or system responsible for the record.

issueCodes.title: Draft record
issueCodes.description: Draft records are not considered release-ready.
issueCodes.resolution: Move the record to review or ready once the contract is accepted.

issueCodes.title: Pack discovery failed
issueCodes.description: A local or installed pack source could not be resolved into a valid pack manifest.
issueCodes.resolution: Check local pack paths and installed `verityspec.packs` entry points, then rerun `verity pack list`.

issueCodes.title: Unknown pack
issueCodes.description: The requested pack ID is not available.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity pack list` and use one of the listed pack IDs.

issueCodes.title: Required profile pack missing
issueCodes.description: The selected product-contract profile requires a pack that is not loaded by the workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required pack to the workspace, or use a profile that matches the workspace scope.

issueCodes.title: Required profile record kind missing
issueCodes.description: The selected product-contract profile requires at least one record of a specific kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required record kind, or use a profile that matches the workspace scope.

issueCodes.title: Readiness list too small
issueCodes.description: A readiness gate requires a list field to contain at least a minimum number of items.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required items to the record.

issueCodes.title: Readiness field missing
issueCodes.description: A readiness gate requires a field that is missing or empty.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required field or adjust the relevant pack readiness gate.

issueCodes.title: Duplicate record ID
issueCodes.description: Two records use the same ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Give each record a unique stable ID.

issueCodes.title: Missing record ID
issueCodes.description: A record does not define a string ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Add an id field that matches the VeritySpec ID pattern.

issueCodes.title: Missing record kind
issueCodes.description: A record does not define a string kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a kind field declared by one of the loaded packs.

issueCodes.title: Unknown record kind
issueCodes.description: A record uses a kind not declared by the loaded packs.
issueCodes.resolution: Load the pack that declares the kind or change the record kind.

issueCodes.title: Deprecated reference
issueCodes.description: A record references another record marked deprecated.
issueCodes.resolution: Move the reference to the replacement record or acknowledge it before release.

issueCodes.title: Disallowed reference relationship
issueCodes.description: The source kind, relationship, and target kind combination is not allowed by loaded pack rules.
issueCodes.resolution: Use an allowed relationship or add a pack rule that explicitly permits it.

issueCodes.title: Missing reference target
issueCodes.description: A reference points to a record ID that does not exist in the workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Create the target record or update the reference target.

issueCodes.title: Removed reference target
issueCodes.description: A record references another record marked removed.
issueCodes.resolution: Remove the reference or point it to an active replacement.

issueCodes.title: Unused schema
issueCodes.description: A schema record has no incoming references.
issueCodes.resolution: Reference the schema from a record or remove it.

issueCodes.title: Schema validation failure
issueCodes.description: A record does not satisfy the JSON Schema for its kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the record to match its pack schema.

issueCodes.title: Critical security control not verified
issueCodes.description: A critical security control is release-relevant but is not marked as verified.
issueCodes.resolution: Set coverage to verified and provide a verification method other than not-verified with evidence.

issueCodes.title: Security verification evidence stale
issueCodes.description: A security control declares a review cadence, but its verification date is missing or older than that cadence.
issueCodes.resolution: Update verification.lastVerified after reviewing the evidence, or adjust verification.reviewCadenceDays to the accepted cadence.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace pack paths
issueCodes.description: A v0.2.0 workspace declares packPaths, but it is not an array of strings.
issueCodes.resolution: Set packPaths to an array of local pack paths, or [] when no external packs are used.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace pack paths
issueCodes.description: A v0.2.0 workspace must declare packPaths explicitly.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` or add `"packPaths": []` to verityspec.json.

issueCodes.title: Future workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace declares a specVersion newer than this VeritySpec CLI supports.
issueCodes.resolution: Install a newer VeritySpec CLI before validating or migrating the workspace.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace specVersion does not use vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH format.
issueCodes.resolution: Set specVersion to a supported value such as v0.2.0.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace config does not declare a specVersion.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` or add a supported specVersion to verityspec.json.

issueCodes.title: Unsupported workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace declares a version this VeritySpec CLI does not support.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` to produce a supported workspace version.
